frontmatter.title: A Cartesian closed category of event structures with quotients

mainmatter.p: We introduce a new class of morphisms for event structures. The category obtained is cartesian closed, and a natural notion of quotient event structure is defined within it. We study in particular the topological space of maximal configurations of quotient event structures. We introduce the compression of event structures as an example of quotient: the compression of an event structure E is a minimal event structure with the same space of maximal configurations as E.

frontmatter.title: Event structures and prime algebraic domains

mainmatter.p: Event structures are the same thing as prime algebraic domains; on objects, this has been proved many times, but I could only find the correct notion of morphism in a paper of Abbes.
